majorIds.Oneself Unto All: Radiance's radius extends 4 blocks beyond Bash and buffs allies with your stats instead of theirs

before.lore: Sever every last impurity of the self, and bring to fruition a brilliant culmination of 'you'.

after.lore: Sever every last impurity of the self, and bring to fruition a brilliant culmination of 'you'.

majorIds.Regicide: Your projectiles and abilities deal more damage the further away you are from your target, by 2% per block, up to a cap of 120%

before.lore: A boiling rage has been gathering, the pain of an entire empire yearning to be freed. With all the power of the downtrodden and the overlooked and the starved, you echo out a shout with ten thousand voices, each too quiet to hear by itself, but together a catastrophic force to make the heavens cower.

majorIds.Regicide: Your projectiles and abilities deal more damage the further away you are from your target, by 2% per block, up to a cap of 120%.

after.lore: A boiling rage has been gathering, the pain of an entire empire yearning to be freed. With all the power of the downtrodden and the overlooked and the starved, you echo out a shout with ten thousand voices, each too quiet to hear by itself, but together a catastrophic force to make the heavens cower.

majorIds.Chaos Reach: Blood Sorrow spends 20 less points of Blood Pool and inflicts enemies with 0.3 seconds of Bleeding per hit, but no longer grants overhealth.

before.lore: A rage unseen, yet so beautiful, that when you laid your eyes upon it, you knew it had to be unleashed. No matter the cost.

majorIds.Chaos Reach: Blood Sorrow spends 20 less points of Blood Pool and inflicts enemies with 0.3 seconds of Bleeding per hit, but no longer grants overhealth.

after.lore: A rage unseen, yet so beautiful, that when you laid your eyes upon it, you knew it had to be unleashed. No matter the cost.

before.lore: Wielding it for too long will leave one a dessicated husk, as this dull blade slowly absorbs all liquids around it.

after.lore: Wielding it for too long will leave one a desiccated husk, as this dull blade slowly absorbs all liquids around it.

majorIds.Desperate Measures: Walk Speed increases by 1% and Jump Height increases by 2% for every 1% hp missing

before.lore: You have gotten tired of the abyss staring back. Embrace it in a finale that leaves no survivors.

majorIds.Desperate Measures: Walk Speed increases by 1% and Jump Height increases by 2% for every 1% hp missing.

after.lore: You have gotten tired of the abyss staring back. Embrace it in a finale that leaves no survivors.

majorIds.Napalm: Fire Creep increases Arrow Bomb damage by +15%, but deals 15 times the self-damage and lowers velocity. Scorched Earth radius is increased and deals +65%.

before.lore: Gunpowder is your favourite scent. It signals peace: the enemies have been blown to high hell. And who doesn't love peace?

majorIds.Napalm: Fire Creep increases Arrow Bomb damage by +15%, but deals 15 times the self-damage and lowers velocity. Scorched Earth radius is increased and deals +65%.
